items.title: Targeted Alpha Therapy Market, Drugs Approval, Proprietary Technologies & Clinical Trials: 20+ Drugs of Targeted Alpha Therapy In Clinical Trials
items.author: Researchandmarkets.Com
items.description: The article discusses the growing field of targeted alpha therapy, a novel approach in radiopharmaceuticals that utilizes alpha emitters to precisely target and eliminate diseased tissues. It highlights the approval of Xofigo, the first approved alpha-emitting radiopharmaceutical, and the surge of innovative preclinical and clinical candidates in development by various companies.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions Actinium Pharma as one of the companies active in the targeted alpha therapy market, indicating their involvement in this growing field.
The article lists Johnson & Johnson as one of the companies active in the targeted alpha therapy market, indicating their involvement in this growing field.
